name: Decor Life
author: Poki
description: Decor Life is a cozy decor game where you can sort, organize, renovate, and design to your heart’s content! If you love home makeovers, fresh spaces, and trying out new styles, this is the perfect place to unleash your inner designer. Decor rooms by arranging furniture, placing décor items, and experimenting with different looks. No stress, no mess, just pure creativity. With tons of unique spaces and simple mechanics, every makeover feels satisfying and fun. Ready to build your dream home again and again? How to play Decor Life? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Decor Life? Decor Life is created by SayGames. Play their other games on Poki: My Perfect Hotel , Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game and Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter ! How can I play Decor Life for free? You can play Decor Life for free on Poki. Can I play Decor Life on mobile devices and desktop? Decor Life can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
